artPrompt: A goblin noble standing triumphant atop a rickety honking cart at the head of a clattering procession, arms thrown wide, a ragtag brass band trailing in a haze of dust and sparks; the carts barrel through the firelit square, overturned boxes and torn bunting smearing into ember-red and night-black smoke, the chaotic parade rendered with a dreamy, almost wistful swirl, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Mayoral Motorcade
text:
Trample, haste
Whenever Mayoral Motorcade attacks, Goblins you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.
flavorText: Three honking carts, a brass band, and absolutely no permit.
